wine_bars.name: Le Wine Bar by Le Vintage
wine_bars.wine_program: More than 1200 references including some 400 champagnes from growers and houses, plus burgundies and 100 spirits; large formats and older grower vintages
wine_bars.description: The bar of the Le Vintage wine shop beside the Place du Forum in Reims, run by the Papavero brothers, with a vast list of grower and house champagnes.

wine_bars.name: The Glue Pot
wine_bars.wine_program: A former English pub turned champagne and wine lounge with a boutique selection of grower cuvees; a haunt where local winemakers drink
wine_bars.description: A long-running spot on the Place Drouet d'Erlon in Reims that grew from an English pub into a champagne and wine lounge. Boutique grower cuvees and a winemaker.

wine_bars.name: Le Coq Rouge
wine_bars.wine_program: Champagne-led list spanning growers and houses, poured with tapas-style small plates and charcuterie; a winemaker hangout near the cathedral
wine_bars.description: A lively champagne and wine bar on rue Chanzy near Reims Cathedral, serving small plates with cuvees from growers and houses. A favourite of visiting winemakers.

wine_bars.name: Au Bon Manger
wine_bars.wine_program: Carefully curated organic and biodynamic grower champagnes and natural wines, poured alongside local seasonal small plates by owners Aline and Eric Serva
wine_bars.description: A neighbourhood bar, cave and kitchen on a quiet Reims street, run by Aline and Eric Serva. The focus is small-scale, organic and biodynamic champagne with local.

wine_bars.name: Sacre Bistro
wine_bars.wine_program: Wide champagne-by-the-glass selection plus a serious natural-wine list, served in a relaxed central Epernay bistro with local seasonal cooking
wine_bars.description: A youthful bistro on the Place Auban-Moet in Epernay with a serious champagne-by-the-glass and natural-wine list. Local, seasonal, often organic plates accompany.

wine_bars.name: Bar Brut
wine_bars.wine_program: Grower-champagne specialist on the Avenue de Champagne, pouring small-producer cuvees by the glass in a relaxed setting
wine_bars.description: A grower-champagne bar on the Avenue de Champagne in Epernay, pouring small-producer cuvees by the glass. A relaxed stop between the avenue house cellars.

wine_bars.name: C. Comme Bar a Champagne
wine_bars.wine_program: Self-serve grower-champagne bar pouring dozens of small-producer cuvees by the glass, with cheese and charcuterie boards from the region
wine_bars.description: The bar side of C. Comme on rue Gambetta in Epernay, pouring dozens of grower champagnes by the glass. Cheese and charcuterie boards make it a full evening stop.

wine_bars.name: Les Grands Vins de France
wine_bars.wine_program: More than 50 independent grower champagnes across the appellation, with a weekly rotating tasting of five cuvees served by the glass and bottle
signature_pours: Cote des Blancs Blanc de Blancs
Vallee de la Marne Pinot Meunier
wine_bars.description: A grower-champagne cave and bar in central Epernay carrying more than 50 independent producers. A weekly five-cuvee tasting is poured by the glass at 7.50 euros.
